emails.subject: RE: Super Bowl
emails.body: RE: Super Bowl right now i guess we have 6 i have not heard back from boone. val said he would stop by if they were back in town by then. i didn't have mitch's e-mail so you may want to forward to him and i will talk to hull. i guess we could have about 10 people. what do you think? To: Bass, Eric

emails.subject: RE: Super Bowl
emails.body: looks like we need to have a co-ordinated effort because i think val may be having people over too. i am indifferent as to where the party is held, but would like a consensus. you guys should probably talk about it. To: Blanchard, Timothy

emails.subject: RE: Super Bowl
emails.body: he told me that he wasn't sure if he would be in town. i guess there is no need to have two. so i won't have one then To: Bass, Eric

emails.subject: RE: Super Bowl
emails.body: i wouldn't cancel anything until you talk to him first. he may not be having anything. I'm just hearing that he might. To: Blanchard, Timothy
